title: City of Dallas Orders Seven Additional Beam Global EV ARC Units
text: Beam Global announced that the City of Dallas ordered seven additional EV ARC transportable EV charging systems. This is Dallas's third EV ARC deployment and fourth overall purchase from Beam Global. The systems will charge the city's expanding EV fleet, including electric pickup trucks, and operate off-grid without construction, utility connection, or onsite electrical work. The purchase was made via the U.S. GSA Multiple Award Schedule (MAS) contract following Beam's recently renewed GSA contract and new Sourcewell contract, which simplify public-sector procurement. The City of Dallas targets all new light-duty vehicles and transit buses to be electric by 2030 and its full fleet by 2040 as part of a carbon neutrality goal by 2050.
